title: ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES - 211info
text: SALEM OFFICE ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Investigates allegations of abuse due to physical harm or injury, financial exploitation, verbal or emotional abuse, involuntary seclusion, wrongful restraint, unwanted sexual contact, abandonment by the caregiver, failure to provide basic care or self-neglect (when individuals lack the cognitive ability to care for themselves, which can lead to harm). 3410 Cherry Avenue NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Age 65 and older or age 18 and older with physical or developmental disabilities or a mental health condition Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Statewide abuse reporting hotline voicemail available 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Email (800) 846-9165 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 846-9165 Hotline (855) 503-7233 Statewide Abuse Reporting Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to make a report or for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation and signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Marion, Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The two-story building is located just north of the intersection of Cherry Avenue NE and Salem Parkway. The entrance to the complex where the building is located is the first entrance north of Salem Parkway, on the east side of Cherry Avenue. Services: Adult Protective Intervention/Investigation Elder/Dependent Adult Abuse Reporting Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM OFFICE
